title: MiniMax M3 开源：428B参数、1M上下文多模态模型
full_text:
Post
Log in Sign up
Post
MiniMax (official)
@MiniMax_AI
With only ~428B params, and ~23B activated params
M3 still handles frontier coding + long-horizon agents + native multimodal (text, image, video) at 1M-token context
few open-weight models do any of this. M3 does all of it.
Thanks @ baseten 🚀
Baseten
@baseten
9h
Congrats to the MiniMax team on the open-source launch of M3!
There are very few <500bn parameter models that can tackle coding, agentic workloads, and multimodal all with a 1M-token context window but M3 does it all.
Dig in here: baseten.co/library/minima…
8:58 PM · Jun 12, 2026 11.9K Views

discovery_record.discovery_title: MiniMax M3 开源：428B参数、1M上下文多模态模型
discovery_record.discovery_summary: MiniMax 开源 M3 模型，约 428B 总参数、23B 激活参数，支持前沿编码、长周期智能体任务及原生多模态（文本、图像、视频），上下文窗口达 1M token。开放权重，可在 Baseten 部署。在少于 500B 参数的模型中，能同时兼顾编码、智能体工作负载和 1M 上下文的模型极少，M3 全部实现。

key_excerpts.text: MiniMax 开源 M3 模型，约 428B 总参数、23B 激活参数，支持前沿编码、长周期智能体任务及原生多模态（文本、图像、视频），上下文窗口达 1M token。开放权重，可在 Baseten 部署。在少于 500B 参数的模型中，能同时兼顾编码、智能体工作负载和 1M 上下文的模型极少，M3 全部实现。

Post Log in Sign up Post MiniMax (official) @MiniMax_AI With only ~428B params, and ~23B activated params M3 still handles frontier coding + long-horizon agents + native multimodal (text, image, video) at 1M-token context few open-weight models do any of this.
Thanks @ baseten 🚀 Baseten @baseten 9h Congrats to the MiniMax team on the open-source launch of M3!
There are very few <500bn parameter models that can tackle coding, agentic workloads, and multimodal all with a 1M-token context window but M3 does it all.
